s: Bring your favorite web apps to your phone
d: Organize all your web apps in one streamlined app. Features include cookie isolation for keeping accounts separate and secure, ClearURLs tracking parameter removal, DNS blocklist domain blocking, and LocalCDN resource caching for privacy, proxy support, workspace organization for grouping sites by category, and find-in-page search. Perfect for managing multiple accounts, separating work and personal sites, and accessing web-based tools efficiently.
